Projects Built

MERN Stack & Python

Full Stack Web Apps

I am a Computer Science and Engineering student at KGiSL Institute of Technology with a strong passion for Full Stack Development and Software Engineering.

I enjoy building responsive and scalable web applications using the MERN Stack. My interests include frontend development, backend systems, databases, and creating real-world software solutions. I thrive on translating design prototypes into interactive, highly performant code interfaces, keeping user experience and clean code architecture at the forefront of my process.

Name: Soundarya J
Email: soundaryaj.cse@gmail.com
Location: Coimbatore, India
Degree: BE Computer Science (2023 - 2027)

My recent works

Featured Projects

skillswaphub.com
Skill Swap Hub
100 Credits
Learn React
Teach Python
MongoDB Express.js React.js Node.js

Skill Swap Hub

Developed a full-stack skill exchange platform where users can teach and learn skills through a credit-based system. Implemented robust authentication, profile management, dynamic credit tracking, and responsive user interfaces.

Key Features:
  • User Authentication
  • Skill Marketplace
  • Credit-Based Learning System
  • Profile Management
GitHub Code Live Demo
footballlivehub.org
Football Live Hub
RMA 2 - 1 BAR LIVE 84'
MongoDB Express.js React.js Node.js Third-Party API

Football Live Hub

Built a football live score platform providing real-time match updates, upcoming fixtures, league standings, and detailed team statistics using external REST APIs.

Key Features:
  • Live Scores
  • Fixtures
  • League Standings
  • Responsive Dashboard
GitHub Code Live Demo
My career path

Experience

Internship

Machine Learning Intern

Privacy Weave

Worked on Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning projects. Gained hands-on experience involving data preprocessing, model training, evaluation, and deploying privacy-focused solutions.

  • Cleaned and prepared large datasets for modeling.
  • Evaluated model metrics and optimized hyperparameters.
  • Collaborated on integration with backend APIs.

Key Achievements

Machine Learning Internship Completed

Successfully completed research and implementation tasks at Privacy Weave with a focus on privacy-preserving model pipelines.

Built Multiple MERN Stack Projects

Constructed and deployed functional complex full-stack web applications featuring secure token auth, responsive client-side routing, and MongoDB interactions.

Strong Foundation in Full Stack

Acquired robust understanding of data modeling, backend architecture with Node.js/Express.js, and modern UI engineering with state hooks.
